description: Canonical biological axis ontology used by HEAL LLM2 deterministic synthesis. Categories from the canon are mapped into these axes before the global LLM receives the payload.

axes.description: Dopamine, serotonin, attention, stress regulation, learning, language, social processing, and broader neurodevelopmental context.
axes.review_domain: attention, stress regulation, sleep interaction, learning, language, neurodevelopment, mood or behavioral context, and psychotropic pharmacogenomics when relevant

axes.description: Cytokines, allergy or IgE context, interferon signaling, immune tolerance, autoimmunity, and inflammatory response modulation.
axes.review_domain: allergic, inflammatory, autoimmune-like, recurrent infection, immune tolerance, family history, and relevant inflammatory or immune laboratory context

axes.display_name: Metabolic, nutrient, methylation, and one-carbon context
axes.description: Insulin sensitivity, nutrient absorption and processing, folate/B12/homocysteine, methylation, and metabolic health context.
axes.review_domain: metabolic health, insulin sensitivity, folate/B12/homocysteine, methylation-related labs, nutrient processing, diet-medication context, and qualified nutrition or metabolism review

axes.description: Gut-brain signaling, microbiome resilience, gastrointestinal-neuroimmune context, and related barrier or signaling pathways.
axes.review_domain: gut-brain symptoms, gastrointestinal context, microbiome resilience, diet tolerance, neuroimmune overlap, and qualified clinical or nutrition review when relevant

axes.description: Xenobiotic metabolism, detox pathways, drug response, toxin-load context, caffeine or medication sensitivity, and pharmacogenomic review points.
axes.review_domain: current or planned medications, adverse drug reactions, caffeine/stimulant sensitivity, toxin or xenobiotic exposure context, and pharmacogenomics review

axes.description: Sleep timing, circadian rhythm, melatonin/circadian signaling, and sleep-related context.
axes.review_domain: sleep complaints, circadian rhythm issues, insomnia or delayed sleep patterns, stimulant/caffeine sensitivity, and clinical sleep review when relevant

axes.description: Mitochondrial energy, oxidative stress, antioxidant/redox handling, cellular repair, aging-related repair potential, and resilience context.
axes.review_domain: energy metabolism, fatigue context, oxidative stress, mitochondrial or repair biology, and qualified clinician review when symptoms or labs support it

axes.description: Canon categories that do not yet map cleanly to a canonical HEAL biological axis.
axes.review_domain: manual review of canon category mapping before final report release
